title: ScaleRays
description: A small mod that adds ScaleRays that work with pehkui
body:
Just a simple mod that adds a raygun that can scale the player
============
![The ScaleRay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a99edb711b64d4e7862429d4b03de28a5fa7711.png)

**If theres any bugs its because this is the first java mod i have ever made**
Also though its got items and everything at its core (get it scaling co- ok im shutting up)
its just a mod that adds an item than when right clicked runs the /scale command from pehkui
but i was fun trying to make a mod with just code.
